title: Epigenomics of Alzheimer's disease.
author: Bennett DA Yu L Yang J Srivastava GP Aubin C De Jager PL
content: S-EPMC4233194 PMC4233194 Epigenomics of Alzheimer's disease. Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a large and growing public health problem. It is characterized by the accumulation of amyloid β peptides and abnormally phosphorylated tau proteins that are associated with cognitive decline and dementia. Much
